positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a celestial fox silhouette (kitsune) amid a vibrant, geometric nebula. The fox should be depicted with dynamic posture and elegant lines, surrounded by swirling pastel cosmic dust (pinks, deep indigos, electric violets) and sharp, abstract stellar patterns. Use a strong, clean contrast against a muted background, ensuring the silhouette pops. Composition should be perfectly centered, making it highly scalable for apparel printing. Vector art quality, clean lines, intricate negative space, perfect symmetry, Art Deco influence mixed with cosmic fantasy, graphic novel style, 8k print resolution, solid block colors, high contrast, elegant linework.
negative: low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, noisy, blurry, sketch, cartoon, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, celebrity likeness, poor contrast, busy background, grainy, realistic photo
